stories.title: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs

sources.title: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs
sources.title_en: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs
sources.title_original: AMD to supply Anthropic with 2 gigawatts of Instinct MI450 GPUs — will invest up to $5 billion in the Claude developer, which is already using MI355X GPUs
sources.summary: The first gigawatt is scheduled to come online in the first half of 2027 in AMD Helios rack-scale systems.
sources.summary_zh: 第一个千兆瓦容量计划于 2027 年上半年在 AMD Helios 机架规模系统中上线。

stories.title: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects

sources.title: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连 / Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.title_zh: 光学内部和规模之战——人工智能行业如何竞相集成光子互连
sources.title_en: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.title_original: Inside optical and the battle for scale – how the AI industry is racing to integrate photonic interconnects
sources.summary: With the limitations of copper looming, the industry is transitioning to photonic interconnects to scale data center capabilities. We spoke to experts such as Lightmatter chief executive Nick Harris about the new scale-out paradigm and the battle for control over emerging standards.
sources.summary_zh: 随着铜的局限性日益显现，该行业正在转向光子互连以扩展数据中心的能力。我们采访了 Lightmatter 首席执行官尼克·哈里斯 (Nick Harris) 等专家，讨论了新的横向扩展范式以及对新兴标准的控制权之争。

stories.title: Arctic Senza AI 370 评测：采用隐形桌下无风扇设计的 Strix Point / Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design

sources.title: Arctic Senza AI 370 评测：采用隐形桌下无风扇设计的 Strix Point / Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
sources.title_zh: Arctic Senza AI 370 评测：采用隐形桌下无风扇设计的 Strix Point
sources.title_en: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
sources.title_original: Arctic Senza AI 370 review: Strix Point in a stealthy under-desk fanless design
sources.summary: The Arctic Senza AI 370 is a fanless mini PC designed to mount under your desk. Everyday performance isn’t held back by the lack of active cooling, and its soldered dual-channel 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 is appreciated during the RAM shortages. The meager front panel I/O is the only major drawback to the design.
sources.summary_zh: Arctic Senza AI 370 是一款无风扇迷你电脑，设计用于安装在办公桌下。日常性能不会因缺乏主动冷却而受到影响，其焊接的双通道 32GB LPDDR5X-8000 在 RAM 短缺期间受到赞赏。前面板 I/O 少是该设计的唯一主要缺点。

The meager front panel I/O is the only major drawback to the design.

stories.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'

sources.title: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_en: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.title_original: 142 AI data center protests staged in 42 states as public opposition increases — organizers brand 'unaccountable' buildouts as an 'unacceptable infringement on our liberty'
sources.summary: Data center projects are facing increasing opposition from surrounding communities, making consent even far scarcer than the chips and power needed to run these facilities. Any developer planning to construct one must now consider the people living around the proposed site and take account for the months or years needed to approve it, if it even gets the green light.
sources.summary_zh: 数据中心项目面临着周边社区越来越多的反对，这使得同意比运行这些设施所需的芯片和电力更加稀缺。任何计划建造的开发商现在都必须考虑居住在拟议地点周围的人们，并考虑批准它所需的数月或数年，即使它获得了批准。

stories.title: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions

sources.title: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.title_en: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.title_original: Jensen Huang argues American companies should be allowed to use Chinese AI models — Nvidia CEO says backdoors connected to China are misconceptions
sources.summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang raised several points against the rising sentiment in Washington that U.S. firms should be prevented from accessing Chinese AI models. He also advocates for open models, which he says makes AI more secure.
sources.summary_zh: 英伟达首席执行官黄仁勋针对华盛顿日益高涨的情绪提出了几点观点，即应阻止美国公司使用中国人工智能模型。他还提倡开放模型，他说这使得人工智能更加安全。

stories.title: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限 / The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits

sources.title: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限 / The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.title_zh: USB 连接的未来 (2026) — USB4 版本 2 和 Thunderbolt 5 如何将铜带发挥到其物理极限
sources.title_en: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.title_original: The future of USB connectivity (2026) — How USB4 Version 2 and Thunderbolt 5 are bringing copper to its physical limits
sources.summary: The USB ecosystem is entering another transition that will affect how laptops, desktops, storage devices, displays, and peripherals connect in the second half of the decade.
sources.summary_zh: USB 生态系统正在进入另一个转变，这将影响笔记本电脑、台式机、存储设备、显示器和外围设备在本世纪后半叶的连接方式。
